text: Posted the updated Session 4 handout with the de-identified removal case study. Feedback welcome before the fall cohort.
This is great, Ryan. I am borrowing the discussion prompts for my Tuesday group.
How are folks handling the secondary-trauma module without it landing too heavy in week 2?
I move it to week 6 and pair it with the self-care plan. Lands better once they trust the room.
Adding a link to the CWLA standards doc for anyone updating their court-process session.
